themes.reasoning_notes: Delve is explicit and central: exiled graveyard cards both reduce cost and determine which abilities Soulflayer gains.
Turns one body into a keyword-stacked threat by inheriting combat abilities from creatures exiled to delve.
Wants creatures with relevant keywords in the graveyard, so self-mill commonly supports its deckbuilding plan.
